title: The Whole Town's Talking
writer: Anita Loos, John Emerson, Raymond Cannon
actors: Edward Everett Horton, Virginia Lee Corbin, Trixie Friganza
plot: In 1919, Chester Binney, a wounded World War I veteran, is discharged from the U.S. Army in Los Angeles, and returns to his hometown. There he is feted by his pre-war employer, George Simmons, who hopes to strike up a romance betw...
